news.headline: Stocks have surged in the first half, hitting new highs. The rally is still ongoing despite some concerns.
US Marshals Service taps Coinbase to custody and transact crypto assets after RFP, with significant implications.
news.summary: Coinbase Prime has been chosen by the U.S. Marshals Service to manage and conduct transactions involving its digital assets after a formal proposal process. This move signifies a significant development in the realm of cryptocurrency, with the U.S. Marshals Service entrusting Coinbase Prime with the custody and handling of their crypto assets. The decision highlights the growing importance of cryptocurrency in various sectors, with Coinbase Prime being designated to oversee the management and transactions related to the U.S. Marshals Service's digital assets.

news.headline: Summer in The Bahamas promises excitement with events like Goombay Summer Festival on Eleuthera; July 2024 heats up!
news.summary: Discover the enchanting Eleuthera island in The Bahamas as it shines under the scorching summer sun in July 2024. Offering a plethora of thrilling activities and vibrant cultural experiences, visitors can immerse themselves in the lively atmosphere of the Goombay Summer Festival and much more. With soaring water temperatures and a lively atmosphere, the island promises an unforgettable summer getaway. Explore this paradise and make the most of the endless adventures awaiting you.

news.headline: Inventors from Plaistow, N.H., develop TABLEGATE truck accessory to hold blueprints for workers; aims to make jobsite tasks more convenient.
news.summary: Two inventors from Plaistow, New Hampshire, introduced TABLEGATE on July 1, 2024, in Pittsburgh. They aimed to offer workers a convenient way of holding and displaying blueprints while at a jobsite. This new design eliminates the hassle of fumbling with blueprints by providing a user-friendly solution.

news.headline: Cary Birkitt recognized as a Pinnacle Life Member in 2024 by The Inner Circle for contributions to Dentistry.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Leesburg, Virginia, Cary Birkitt was recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished 2024 Pinnacle Life Member for his significant advancements in Dentistry. Dr. Birkitt completed his advanced studies at Virginia Commonwealth University where he received his degree.

news.headline: James W. Christopher, MD, FACS named Pinnacle Lifetime Member of The Inner Circle for excellence in minimally invasive surgery.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Mandeville, Louisiana, Dr. James W. Christopher, MD, FACS was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for his outstanding work as a Surgeon Committed to Excellence in Minimally Invasive Surgery. Dr. Christopher's significant contributions have led to this acknowledgment, highlighting his expertise in the field.

news.headline: Robert Cotton recognized as Top Pinnacle Expert by The Inner Circle for 40+ years in Elevator and Escalator Consulting.
news.summary: In San Rafael, California on July 1, 2024, Robert Cotton was recognized as a leading expert in Elevator and Escalator Consulting by The Inner Circle. With over 40 years of experience, he has been acknowledged as a Top Pinnacle Expert in the field. Mr. Cotton, the owner of a reputable consulting firm, is highly respected for his in-depth knowledge and expertise.

news.headline: UFP Technologies acquires AJR Enterprises for $110M, with AJR generating $70M and $75M sales in 2023 and past 12 months.
news.summary: UFP Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: UFPT) has seen an increase in shares following the announcement of its acquisition of AJR Enterprises, LLC for a reported $110 million. AJR Enterprises, a company specializing in the development and manufacturing of single-use safe patient handling systems, achieved sales of around $70 million in 2023 and $75 million in the most recent 12-month period ending in March. The addition of AJR Enterprises' expertise in patient handling systems is viewed positively by UFP Technologies.

news.headline: Merck gains global exclusive rights for opevesostat, converting co-development agreement with Orion Inc; stock impact expected.
news.summary: Merck & Co Inc (NYSE:MRK) recently made an important announcement on Monday regarding their co-development and co-commercialization agreement for opevesostat (MK-5684/ODM-208). They revealed that the option to convert this agreement into an exclusive global license for Merck has been mutually exercised. This decision stems from the original agreement where both parties had the opportunity to convert the co-exclusive license into a global exclusive license for Merck. Consequently, Merck now holds exclusive global rights for the development and commercialization of opevesostat and other related candidates targeting CYP11A1. This recent development means a significant shift in the partnership dynamics. Additionally, the FDA has declined approval for the Merck-Daiichi Sankyo partnered lung cancer drug. For more detailed information, you can refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tesla stock breaks out with Q2 deliveries pending, while BYD hits buy zone with sales nearing 1 million.
news.summary: Tesla's stock surged above a crucial threshold in anticipation of Q2 deliveries, while BYD also saw a rise in stock value as they reclaimed a buy point. BYD's total sales are nearing one million, showcasing a significant milestone for the company. The strong performance of both companies has attracted attention from investors and industry analysts. Tesla and BYD's performance is expected to influence the electric vehicle market and shape future trends.

news.headline: Meme trader Roaring Kitty reveals 6.6% stake in Chewy, causing its stock to fall, along with other meme stocks.
news.summary: On Monday, Chewy Inc. saw a decline in its stock value following the disclosure by meme trader Keith Gill, also known as Roaring Kitty, of owning a 6.6% stake in the company. This news led to a retreat in other meme stocks as well. The post titled "Meme Trader Roaring Kitty Takes A Bite Out Of This New Stock; Chewy, GameStop Retreat" was published on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Dairy Alliance and Publix join to provide runners with milk at Peachtree Health & Fitness Expo in ATLANTA, with the event taking place on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Participants at the Peachtree Health & Fitness Expo in Atlanta on July 1, 2024, were offered nourishing and energizing dairy milk by The Dairy Alliance, a nonprofit supported by dairy farmers in the Southeast. Collaborating with Publix, they provided runners with this refreshing drink to help them hydrate and boost their energy levels. This initiative aimed to support the attendees, with significant numbers benefiting from the nutrient-rich beverage during the event.

news.headline: Lucinity's AI Copilot awarded for innovation in financial crime prevention at the 2024 ICA Compliance Awards in Reykjavik.
news.summary: In Reykjavik, Iceland, on July 1, 2024, Lucinity was honored with the 2024 ICA Award for Innovation in Financial Crime Prevention. This prestigious award acknowledges the company's outstanding AI advancements, particularly the innovative Luci copilot. The ICA Compliance Awards aim to commend excellence in compliance and financial crime prevention.

news.headline: Three growth stocks recommended to buy on July 1st: Daktronics, Inc. (NASDAQ: DAKT) is a top pick, with a Zacks Rank #1 and 34.5% increase in Zacks Consensus Estimate for current year earnings in the last 60 days.
news.summary: Today, on July 1st, investors have three potential stocks to consider with buy ranks and impressive growth prospects. One of them is Daktronics, Inc. (NASDAQ: DAKT), an electronic display systems company with a Zacks Rank #1. In the past 60 days, its Zacks Consensus Estimate for current year earnings has surged by 34.5%. This suggests strong growth potential for the company. For more detailed information on this stock and others, the full story can be accessed on a financial platform.

news.headline: Stocks are slightly up, Nasdaq rises by 0.4%, ISM Manufacturing PMI falls to 48.5%. Treasury yields up, 30-year yield at 4.64%.
news.summary: Wall Street had a mixed start to the week, with major indices slightly above break-even by midday trading in New York. All focus is on key economic events this week, including Fed Chair Jerome Powell's Tuesday speech and Friday's labor market data release. Large-cap indices are doing better than small caps, which are down 0.8%. The S&P 500 increased by 0.2%, while the Nasdaq 100 rose by 0.4%. Technology sector performed well, up by 0.7%, but materials and real estate struggled, declining by 1.7% and 1.2% respectively. The ISM Manufacturing PMI index dropped more than anticipated in June to 48.5%, the third consecutive month of contraction. Treasury yields saw a significant increase, with the 30-year yield rising by 8 basis points to 4.64%.

news.headline: WNS added to Russell 2000® Index on July 1, 2024, as announced by WNS (Holdings) Limited.
news.summary: WNS (Holdings) Limited has been added to the Russell 2000® Index during the annual reshuffling of the Russell stock indexes. The company is now a part of this index, which includes the 2,000 small-cap companies in the US equity market. This move is significant for WNS as it signifies inclusion among the smaller publicly traded companies.

news.headline: Biden plans to remain in the race as convention approaches.
Mammoth Holdings opened Silverstar Car Wash in East Moline, IL, expanding its express car wash platform.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Mammoth Holdings LLC, a leading express car wash platform in the United States, revealed the launch of its most recent branch, Silverstar Car Wash in East Moline, IL. This marks Mammoth's newest site addition in accordance with its tactic of expansion and diversification, reinforcing its status in the industry.

news.headline: Evergreen Home Loans' President Tamra Rieger awarded Woman of Influence by HousingWire in the Western U.S.
news.summary: Bellevue, Washington - Evergreen Home Loans, a comprehensive direct home loan provider operating in the Western U.S., is pleased to share that Tamra Rieger, the company's President, has been recognized as a Woman of Influence by HousingWire. This achievement highlights her leadership in the industry.

news.headline: Prominent oncologist Channing J. Paller, MD recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland on July 1, 2024, Dr. Channing J. Paller was recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for her remarkable work in oncology. A leading expert in oncology research, Dr. Paller specializes in the field and has made significant contributions.

news.headline: Inventor from Brooklyn, Conn., develops AIR MASSAGE WAND to relieve stress, provide relaxation as an alternative to costly treatments.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 1, 2024, an inventor from Brooklyn, Connecticut shared their inspiration for creating the AIR MASSAGE WAND, aiming to alleviate stress and enhance relaxation. The inventor believed that this device would offer a more affordable option compared to pricey massage and pampering services.

news.headline: Haris Choudry named a 2024 Leading Physiatrist by The Inner Circle for contributions to Physiatry and Orthopedics.
news.summary: In a notable inclusion in The Inner Circle, Haris Choudry has been recognized as a prominent physiatrist for the year 2024. Dr. Choudry's exceptional contributions to the fields of Physiatry and Orthopedics have earned him this prestigious title. He completed his advanced studies at the University of Oklahoma, solidifying his expertise in the field.

news.headline: Nana E. Tchabo, MD, FACOG, named Pinnacle Life Member in Gynecologic Oncology by The Inner Circle.
news.summary: In Chester, N.J., on July 1, 2024, Nana E. Tchabo, MD, FACOG, has been recognized in The Inner Circle as a distinguished Pinnacle Life Member for her significant impact on Gynecologic Oncology. Dr. Tchabo, an alumna of Brown University, earned accolades for her notable contributions to the field.

news.headline: Taryn E. LeRoy, MD honored as Pinnacle Lifetime Member by The Inner Circle for contributions in Orthopedic Care.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Boston, Dr. Taryn E. LeRoy was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for her significant contributions to Orthopedic Care. A renowned orthopedic surgeon, Dr. LeRoy is celebrated for her expertise in spine specialization, solidifying her position as a leading figure in the field.

news.headline: Paxos receives approval from MAS to provide digital payment token services in Singapore, with DBS as primary banking partner.
news.summary: Paxos has announced plans to release a stablecoin that meets MAS' forthcoming stablecoin guidelines. DBS has been chosen as the primary banking partner for handling cash management and safeguarding the reserves of the stablecoin. The announcement was made in Singapore on July 1, 2024. Paxos, a reputable blockchain and tokenization platform, is spearheading this initiative, signaling a key development in the cryptocurrency sector.

news.headline: 67 parties borrow $451.783 billion in Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Island Fin Poké Co. in Orlando is hosting a dog-themed social media contest in July 2024, inviting guests to participate with furry friends.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on July 1, 2024, Island Fin Poké Co. will be hosting a dog-themed social media contest. As America's beloved poké spot, they are celebrating dogs as part of the Ohana with a special spotlight this July. Guests are encouraged to get their furry friends and cameras ready for the contest happening this month.

news.headline: ETH price rises as investors anticipate a future spot ETH ETF launch and centralized exchanges witness a decrease in Ether holdings.
news.summary: Today, the price of Ethereum has increased due to investors' high hopes for the launch of an upcoming spot ETH ETF. Additionally, the amount of Ether stored in centralized exchanges has decreased, indicating a potential shift in market dynamics.

news.headline: Dogecoin nears bullish breakout, potential for major rally as traders predict first weekly buy signal since $0.05 and pending golden cross after four years.
news.summary: There is a potential breakout on the horizon for Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) which may lead to positive price movement in the coming weeks, according to well-known traders. Kevin, a crypto trader, has forecasted a weekly buy signal for the first time since DOGE was at $0.05. Additionally, he has highlighted that Dogecoin is only two weekly green candles away from confirming its first weekly golden cross in four years. This "golden cross" is a significant technical pattern indicating the possibility of a substantial uptrend, occurring when a short-term moving average surpasses a long-term moving average.  Investors are advised to monitor this development closely for potential opportunities.

news.headline: US banks raise dividends in Q3 post Fed stress tests; JPMorgan Chase raised to $1.25/share, Bank of America to 26 cents, and Citigroup to 56 cents/share.
news.summary: Several major U.S. banks, including JPMorgan Chase & Co (NYSE:JPM), Bank of America Corp (NYSE:BAC), and Citigroup Inc (NYSE:C), have revealed plans to increase their dividends for the third quarter. This move follows their strong performance in the Federal Reserve's annual stress test. According to reports, these banks have demonstrated their ability to withstand significant economic and market challenges. JPMorgan Chase, the largest U.S. lender, has raised its dividend to $1.25 per share from $1.15 and has authorized $30 billion in new share repurchases starting July 1. Bank of America and Citigroup have also elevated their dividends to 26 cents and 56 cents per share, respectively. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: FTC investigating Teva over 24 patents for inhalers, accused of blocking generic competition.
news.summary: The Federal Trade Commission (FTC) is investigating Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd (NYSE:TEVA) for not removing around 24 patents related to its asthma and COPD inhalers. This is amidst allegations that Teva is using tactics to prevent competition from generics and maintain its market dominance. The FTC has issued a civil investigative demand, similar to a subpoena, as part of this inquiry. This action by the FTC is in line with its scrutiny of "junk patent listings" in the pharmaceutical industry, which has also targeted other companies like Novo Nordisk and AstraZeneca. For more information, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Experts at Benzinga's Digital Assets event predicted significant growth in Bitcoin with ETFs approval, comparing it to gold's rise from $400 to $2,000.
news.summary: In the 2023 digital asset community, anticipation was high for the Securities and Exchange Commission’s decision on spot Bitcoin ETFs. Insights from industry experts were shared at the previous year’s Benzinga Future of Digital Assets event in NYC. Matt Hougan, the chief investment officer at Bitwise Asset Management, highlighted the significant impact of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) ETFs, noting their potential transformational effect on the market. Drawing parallels to the gold market, Hougan suggested that Bitcoin could see similar growth, with gold increasing from $400 to $2,000 over two decades post the introduction of gold ETFs. The event brings together leading experts in the digital asset field to explore major advancements and future trends. Read more on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cardano co-founder Charles Hoskinson raises concerns against AI censorship and handling by Big Tech companies.
news.summary: Concerns have been raised by Charles Hoskinson, a co-founder of Cardano, about the issue of AI censorship and the biased training of AI systems by major Big Tech firms. Hoskinson warns that the selective training of AI models by these companies could lead to potential censorship, impacting free speech and diversity of opinions. He highlights the importance of addressing these concerns as AI continues to play a significant role in shaping various industries. Hoskinson's remarks draw attention to the critical need for transparency and ethical practices in the development and implementation of AI technologies.

news.headline: Aptos requests Aave community's help for integrating non-EVM protocols, engaging 340k+ users.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global population has reached over 7.8 billion people, with approximately 60% of the world residing in Asia. The study also highlighted that the COVID-19 pandemic has impacted economies worldwide, causing a 3.5% decrease in global GDP. Additionally, researchers found that over 200 countries have reported cases of the virus, with more than 100 million confirmed infections and around 2.5 million deaths. The study emphasized the importance of continued vigilance and cooperation in combating the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Circle is the initial licensed stablecoin issuer under MiCA, with USDC and EURC compliant as the first digital fiat tokens.
news.summary: Circle's stablecoins USDC and EURC have made history by becoming the inaugural fully compliant digital fiat tokens to adhere to the rules set forth by Markets in Crypto-Assets. This achievement marks a significant milestone in the industry's evolution as these stablecoins pave the way for widespread adoption and trust among investors. With USDC and EURC leading the charge, more stakeholders are likely to embrace digital assets, fueling the growth of the market. This development underscores the importance of regulatory compliance and transparency in the crypto space.

news.headline: Eye doctor in Farmers Branch, Texas, shares tips in UV Awareness Month to protect eyes from harmful UV rays, prevent permanent damage.
news.summary: An eye doctor from Eyemart Express in Farmers Branch, Texas, has provided valuable suggestions to reduce exposure and prevent lasting eye harm. The guidance, shared on July 1, 2024, highlights the importance of safeguarding our eyes during the summer months when many enjoy the sun and its benefits. This emphasis comes as a measure to protect eyes from potential harm caused by excessive exposure to harmful elements.

news.headline: Samsung Electronics Labor Union plans a 3-day strike.

Vistra stock surged by 125%, lagging only two other S&P 500 companies. It's shifting towards nuclear and alternative energy sources, seizing the investor interest amid global energy transition boom. Microsoft and nuclear are increasingly becoming integral to the push for non-fossil fuel energy. The U.S. co-led efforts to triple nuclear energy capacity by 2050 and Vistra gained significant portfolio through acquisitions to boost its zero-carbon generation projects. Energy storage and nuclear plays a crucial role in Vistra's plans for clean energy expansion.
news.summary: In a recent article by Zacks Equity Research, Vistra (VST) is highlighted as the Bull of the Day, while MasterCraft Boat Holdings, Inc. (MCFT) is labeled as the Bear of the Day. Vistra saw a 125% surge in stock performance in the first half of 2024, positioning it as one of the top performers in the S&P 500, behind Super Micro Computer and Nvidia. Wall Street's interest in companies supporting the U.S. shift away from fossil fuels and embracing AI's energy demand spike has favored Vistra, the largest competitive power generator in the U.S. The company's focus on nuclear and alternative energy sources, along with strong earnings and revenue growth outlook, has attracted investors. Vistra's recent dip presents a promising entry point for investors. Moreover, Vistra's involvement in the Energy Transition Megatrend, with a substantial portion allocated to clean energy investment, highlights the company's strategic positioning. The firm closed a significant deal with Energy Harbor in March, enhancing its zero-carbon generation assets and customer base significantly. Vistra operates sizeable nuclear and energy storage facilities, anticipating growth in the solar assets sector. With a robust growth outlook and active participation in renewable energy projects, Vistra is poised to thrive in the evolving energy landscape.

news.headline: Linea debuts Culture SZN, showcasing 20+ NFT creators, promoting community involvement with free mints and voting for Linea Guilds.
news.summary: Linea's Culture Season is featuring more than 20 NFT creators, aiming to foster community involvement with complimentary mints and opportunities for individuals to vote and establish Linea Guilds.

news.headline: Banijay Group reports weekly share transactions, with a total value exceeding $1 million.
National PTA adopts amendment holding adults accountable for safe firearm storage; crucial vote during virtual convention.
news.summary: During the Level Up PTA 2024 Virtual Convention, held in Alexandria, Virginia on July 1, 2024, delegates made a significant decision regarding the Safe Storage of Firearms resolution. The vote resulted in the adoption of an amendment that mandates the association's backing for legislation enforcing safe storage practices for firearms. This amendment showcases a proactive approach by the National PTA, signaling a commitment to promoting gun safety.

news.headline: STG Logistics releases Corporate Sustainability Report showcasing commitment to various initiatives. Chicago, July 1, 2024.
news.summary: STG Logistics, Inc. (STG) from Chicago released its CSR report highlighting their dedication to various programs such as environmental sustainability, employee well-being, and diversity, equity, and inclusion. The report emphasizes the company's commitment to social responsibility. The document, published on July 1, 2024, showcases STG's efforts in promoting sustainable practices and ensuring the safety and inclusivity of its workforce. STG is recognized as a top transportation provider, and their CSR report demonstrates their focus on important initiatives to drive positive impact within and beyond their organization.

news.headline: Resorts World Las Vegas wins 8 awards and Webby Honoree for "Rule the World" campaign. In total, the campaign won 8 awards.
news.summary: Resorts World Las Vegas has recently earned recognition for its innovative "Rule the World" marketing campaign. The campaign, which won a total of eight awards, showcased exceptional creativity. The achievements were celebrated during a recent event at the Las Vegas resort.

news.headline: Massage Heights partners with NAMI to raise $100,000 by 2024 for mental health support; month-long initiative in July.
news.summary: A popular massage franchise has teamed up with the national non-profit organization NAMI to support mental health awareness. With one in five U.S. adults affected by mental illness, Massage Heights has pledged to raise $100,000 for NAMI by 2024. The partnership aims to bring attention to the importance of mental health and provide support to those in need.

news.headline: Inventor from Wisconsin creates FLOW INSOLES for comfort and pain relief. Designed for extended standing on hard surfaces.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 1, 2024, an inventor from Kaukauna, Wisconsin shared plans for a new shoe insert aimed at improving comfort and cushioning while standing on hard surfaces for long periods. The invention, called FLOW INSOLES, is designed to alleviate foot strain and provide enhanced support.

news.headline: Globant (NYSE: GLOB) integrates AI Agents into SDLC to enhance development. AI Agents assist in product definition, backend prototyping, and application design to streamline processes and accelerate AI adoption across industries.
news.summary: Globant (NYSE: GLOB) has integrated AI Agents into its software development life cycle to enhance development capabilities. These AI Agents, supervised by human intelligence, are meant to optimize solutions and support various industries in accelerating AI adoption. They work alongside Globant's existing AI products, such as Augoor, MagnifAI, and Navigate, to provide a comprehensive suite of AI-driven solutions. The company has introduced several AI Agents for the SDLC process: Product Definition AI Agent streamlines product definition, Backend Prototyping AI Agent simplifies backend development, and Application Design AI Agent converts concepts into reality. These agents aim to make software development more efficient. For more details, the full article is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Urban Outfitters' URBN shows strong Q1 results; FP Movement grows 25%, Free People's wholesale up 6%. Nuuly adds 50K subscribers, totaling 244K active. Sustaining growth through strategic retail expansion and innovation.
news.summary: Urban Outfitters Inc. is positioned for long-term growth with key initiatives like FP Movement and Nuuly driving success. In the first quarter of fiscal 2025, the company reported strong performance, with FP Movement showing 25% growth in retail segment and plans for expansion. Free People's wholesale segment saw a 6% year-over-year sales increase. Nuuly, the rental business, added over 50,000 new subscribers compared to the previous quarter, reaching over 244,000 active subscribers by the end of the quarter. URBN's focus on consumer engagement, retail expansion, and sustainability reaffirms its commitment to success in the market.

news.headline: Research firm 10x warns Bitcoin could drop to $55,000 due to 10 factors including trend indicators and political uncertainty.
news.summary: Research firm 10x Research has issued a warning about a potential Bitcoin downturn to $55,000, based on ten key factors outlined in their report. The firm notes that Bitcoin entered a downtrend on June 20, following a trend model favored by institutional investors. This trend may lead to increased short positions by trend-following funds like Commodity Trading Advisors (CTAs), particularly due to the currently low volatility environment. Weekly and monthly reversal indicators also point towards a broader correction, with the weekly Relative Strength Index declining since early March despite Bitcoin's value remaining above $60,000. The monthly Stochastic oscillator is displaying patterns similar to previous multi-month peaks in early 2018 and mid-2021. Additionally, political factors, such as the recent Presidential Debate, are contributing to market uncertainty, with potential implications for future crypto regulations in the US.

news.headline: Rite Aid reduces $2 billion debt through bankruptcy, closes stores, and sells Elixir; $750 million loss in 2023.
news.summary: A U.S. bankruptcy judge has given the green light to Rite Aid Corp’s restructuring proposal. This move will enable the pharmacy chain to slash its debt by $2 billion and hand over control to a consortium of lenders. Rite Aid entered Chapter 11 bankruptcy proceedings in October 2023 after facing a challenging fiscal year with losses amounting to $750 million and revenue hitting $24 billion. Throughout the bankruptcy process, Rite Aid shuttered several stores, divested its pharmacy benefit firm Elixir, and reached agreements with various creditors, such as McKesson Corp and other lenders. The restructuring efforts rescued the company from potential closure, sparing its operations. Additionally, the restructuring scheme earmarked $47.5 million for junior creditors, comprising individuals and local governments that had taken legal action against Rite Aid for its alleged involvement.

news.headline: Belém to host COP 30, a test for Amazon cities in safeguarding the rainforest, as reported by CityLab.
news.summary: An updated report states that approximately 3,500 people have been affected by the recent flooding in the region. This number includes individuals who have been displaced from their homes and are currently residing in temporary shelters. Additionally, over 500 homes have been damaged due to the floodwaters, with estimated repair costs amounting to $2.5 million. Local authorities are continuing rescue and relief efforts to assist those impacted by the disaster.
